title: RPL root status_cbor uses hardcoded instead of s_dodag after init
description: Codereview pass 1: status_get/notify and encode still had some hardcodes before edits; dodag_id derivation uses link-local but spec 4-network.md prefers primary 02xx address for root DODAGID to match Rust new_root(). File as codereview tag. Fix: update derivation to use primary addr.
